science.title: FSRS - The smartest review algorithm today

spacedRepetition.title: Spaced Repetition
spacedRepetition.description: is a review method based on the "forgetting curve" - you only review when about to forget, saving up to 90% of time.

fsrs.title: FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler)
fsrs.description: is a next-generation algorithm, 1.5x more accurate than Anki in predicting when you're about to forget.

ml.title: Machine Learning
ml.description: in our system learns from your behavior - response time, accuracy, study time - to adjust the algorithm specifically for you.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about our method and application

questions.question: What is FSRS and how is it different from Anki?
questions.answer: FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) is a next-generation algorithm developed by the open-source community. Research shows FSRS is about 1.5x more accurate than Anki's SM-2 algorithm in predicting when you'll forget information.

questions.question: How long do I need to study each day?
questions.answer: Just 15-30 minutes per day is enough. The key is consistent daily practice, not cramming. The system will automatically adjust the workload to fit your available time.

questions.question: Is the app suitable for beginners?
questions.answer: Absolutely! The system will assess your level through an initial test and create a suitable learning path. Whether you're a beginner or advanced, AI will personalize content for you.

questions.question: Is my learning data secure?
questions.answer: Definitely! We use end-to-end encryption and don't share personal data with third parties. You have full control and can delete your data at any time.
